action.reasoning: Observation: After 200-row LoRA training, val accuracy on first 100 jumped from 11% to 24%. Loss declined nicely. Analysis: More training data + more epochs should significantly improve. With ~9.5h left, I have budget for 2-3 longer training runs. Each predict on 100 takes ~3min. Let me train on 4000 rows for 1 epoch and see how that compares. Decision: Run larger LoRA training (4000 rows, 1 epoch) and evaluate on val.
